description.value:
Trigger A creature attacks an employee

Effect The barathu moans and squirms, attempting to ward off the attackers. All non-employee creatures within 30 feet must succeed at a @Check[will|dc:18] save or be @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.Frightened]{Frightened 1} for as long as the hazard remains active. The barathu then rolls initiative.

name: Delightful Agony in Nourishing the Meek

details.description: The merged barathu twitches and groans, trying to stop others from rescuing them.
details.disable: @Check[athletics|dc:17] (trained) to hold the barathu's tentacles down until they give up, @Check[diplomacy|dc:19] (expert) to plead with the barathu to stop; two total successes (using any skills) are required to disable the haunt
details.reset: The hazard resets automatically after a few moments out of combat, healing only if fed.
details.routine: (3 actions) The barathu attempts to Grab up to two creatures within 10 feet with a +14 Athletics modifier, then squeezes each creature it has @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.Grabbed], dealing @Damage[(1d10+4)[bludgeoning]] damage. The barathu doesn't apply a multiple attack penalty to the second attempt to Grab.
